title: São José dos Campos、SP — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: São José dos Campos、SPの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

São José dos CamposはSPにある人口737,310の都市です。A major aerospace and technology hub in São Paulo state, home to Embraer and INPE, surrounded by the Serra da Mantiqueira mountains.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
